Milestone #161 — Assess + Remediate

The 4 merged Loop-Library features scored 6.2/10 (C+) by an independent adversarial review: sound designs that overclaim enforcement (CI gates, tests, a published pack) that doesn't exist as code yet. Drag the 8 remediation items across Ship now / Open issue / Defer, then copy the plan. Tab a card, ← → move it.

composite 6.2 · C+

Verification: PASS — test:skills + test:manifests green on main, links resolve, 4 playgrounds shipped, no count drift. The scores below are design/enforcement quality, not "did it ship" (it did).
